title: AuditReceipt
description: Protocol-owned audit receipt family for typed signed acknowledgements or anchoring records attached to audit events.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for audit receipts.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this audit receipt.

event_digest.description: Digest reference for the audit event acknowledged by this receipt.

receipt_kind.description: Machine-consumed receipt classification owned by the audit subsystem.

recorder.description: Principal identity for the component or actor that recorded this receipt.

recorded_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp recording when this receipt was produced.

receipt_payload_schema_id.description: Schema identifier for an optional typed receipt payload.

receipt_payload.description: Optional typed receipt payload whose shape is defined by receipt_payload_schema_id.

signatures.description: Detached signatures attesting to the audit receipt contents.

items.description: Detached signature block for the audit receipt payload.
